productDisplayName: Arrow New York Men Grey Check Slim Fit Shirt
description: Style NoteRefresh your formal wardrobe with this shirt from arrow. This piece gives a face lift to your on-duty staples with its flattering cut and impeccable silhouette. It sits well under a structured blazer for dressy occasions. Wear this with dark or light chinos to alternate between looks when you're heading to work, and style with formal shoes from provogue, available online at myntra. For a stylish fusion of formal and casual, wear this with classic denims, a bold belt and matching casual leather shoes.Product DetailsGrey and white checked long sleeved formal shirt  with buttoned cuffs, has a full buttoned placket with a spread collar and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironDo not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18'' ) is wearing size M
